name: known-safe false-positive seed corpus
description: Representative safe contract shapes modeled after widely audited protocol families. Every unexpected finding in this corpus is counted as a false positive.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: OpenZeppelin Ownable-style access control
cases.notes: Admin path is protected by onlyOwner. ACCESS-002 is retained as an informational centralization limitation rather than a vulnerability.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: OpenZeppelin ReentrancyGuard-style withdrawal
cases.notes: External call is guarded and state is updated before interaction.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: OpenZeppelin SafeCast-style bounded cast
cases.notes: Downcast is guarded by an explicit upper-bound check.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: ECDSA helper with zero-address rejection
cases.notes: Signature recovery checks address(0), nonce, domain separator, and canonical s bound.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: SafeERC20-style optional return wrapper
cases.notes: Low-level call is isolated in a library wrapper and validates return data.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: Uniswap v4 hook-style pool-manager guard
cases.notes: Hook callback validates msg.sender and settles transient state.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: Aave v3 pool facade access and pause controls
cases.notes: Risk knobs are role-gated and flash-loan callback validates initiator.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: Compound III Comet-style collateral accounting
cases.notes: Collateral operations use bounded math and explicit market pause checks.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: Safe module owner/nonce execution
cases.notes: Execution uses nonce replay protection and threshold authorization.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: ERC-4337 EntryPoint-style nonce and prefund checks
cases.notes: User operation path validates nonce and prefund before execution.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: ERC-4626 preview/actual consistency
cases.notes: Preview and deposit use the same conversion path.

cases.provenance: local representative fixture: oracle staleness and TWAP guard
cases.notes: Oracle read checks updatedAt and answeredInRound, then applies a TWAP bound.
